page_title: Attack on Titan Coloring Book: Our Fights
text:
is the second coloring book based on the Attack on Titan manga by Hajime Isayama.

Contents

An "Attack on Titan" official coloring book! Includes many famous scenes! Color the passionate fight for freedom with all your heart! The Attack Titan, the Female Titan, the Beast Titan, the Armored Titan, the Colossus Titan, the War Hammer Titan, the Founding Titan, and the Rumbling... The excitement will be revived!
